title: The Reason for Ibrahim b. 'Abdallah 's Revolt and Murder and How It Came About
description: The Reason for Ibrahim b. 'Abdallah 's Revolt and Murder and How It Came About. Recorded under the year 145 AH (762–763 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 28.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
